scene: A doodle Roman with a laurel wreath exhaling a puff of tiny dots, big black caps CAESAR'S LAST BREATH. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
The puff of tiny dots spreading out over a simple flat world map, big black caps SPREAD EVERYWHERE. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
A modern stick figure breathing in with one glowing red dot among the air dots, big black caps ONE JUST REACHED YOU. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
The stick figure looking amazed, lungs drawn with a tiny glowing dot inside, big black caps BREATHING HISTORY. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
